prestazioni: Replace the stock 2.9L C-Series inline-6 (engine code: 12H) with a fully built 3.5L stroker kit using a forged crankshaft from Cosworth (part #COS-12H-3500), forged pistons from JE (part #203500), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (part #CB-6250H). Pair with a custom 3-angle valve job by Burton Power and a Schrick 284° camshaft (part #4201) for high-lift performance.

Install a custom fabricated stainless steel exhaust system by Janspeed Engineering with 2.5-inch mandrel-bent piping, 4-into-2-into-1 headers, and a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for optimized scavenging while retaining classic tone. Pair with a Weber 45 DCOE carburetor setup (dual 45mm throttle bodies) and a custom intake manifold by RPI Engineering for improved airflow.

Upgrade the stock Salisbury differential with a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part #QDF7Z) and pair with a close-ratio 5-speed gearbox from a Rover SD1 Vitesse (gear ratios: 1st 2.92, 2nd 1.78, 3rd 1.22, 4th 1.00, 5th 0.83). Reinforce the drivetrain with a custom aluminum flywheel from Tilton Engineering (part #54-100020) and a Sachs Performance clutch (part #3000 951 001).
estetica: Fit a full carbon fiber widebody conversion kit by Kamei (originally designed for the MGC but discontinued; sourced via vintage motorsport specialists) with integrated fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Paint in a custom two-tone scheme: British Racing Green (BS381C-224) with gold pinstriping by Signwave UK.

Replace the stock steel wheels with 16x8-inch Minilite replica wheels by Revolution Wheels (part #REV-1680-MINI) wrapped in 225/50R16 Avon CR6ZZ tires. Pair with Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers (part #120-10876) and 12-inch vented rotors (part #220-11110) for retro-modern braking performance.

Install a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (part #SD0300) with bolt-in design and integrated harness bar. Upholster the interior with black Alcantara by Autostyle UK, featuring MGC-specific embroidery on the door cards and a custom dashboard overlay in carbon fiber by Dashcap UK. Replace the stock steering wheel with a 330mm Nardi Classic (part #120.330.00/13) wrapped in Connolly leather.
